consensus_score.reasoning: Both models agreed on completion time within 3.3 seconds and detected the same phases. Major disagreement on drain gap visibility: Claude reported visible gap with partial closure (12.5 total penalties), GPT-4o reported complete closure (2.5 penalties only). Final knot assessment was not clearly visible enough to definitively support gap penalty, so conservative scoring applied only rubric-specified placement deviation.

disagreements.rationale: Both times are reasonable given frame analysis differences; consensus uses midpoint
Gap visibility disagreement without clear visual evidence in either analysis to definitively support the penalty
Claude's additional 8.0 in quality/efficiency penalties are not specified in the official rubric categories
Used consensus time and penalty values with official scoring formula
